name: manny-roy
description: Custom Ghost theme foundation for Manny Roy Consulting. Systems-focused, accessible, and built for clarity and sustainable technical storytelling.

header_logo.description: Logo for header, hero badge, favicon, and social sharing. Leave empty to use theme asset (assets/images/logo7.png). Do NOT set Publication logo/icon in Ghost — theme branding is manual.

hero_headline.default: Untangle complex technical and operational problems.

hero_subtext.default: Sustainable systems rooted in data, collaboration, and measurable impact.

footer_bio.default: Independent technical consultant. Systems, automation, applied AI. Souris, PEI.

contact_form_action.description: Form submission URL (e.g. Formspree, Basin). Replace YOUR_FORM_ID with your form ID.

about_hero_subtext.default: Technical systems are rarely just technical. They're operational, financial, human, and often quietly political.

about_intro_p1.default: I'm Amanda "Manny" Roy (they/them), a full-stack developer and independent technical consultant based in Souris, PEI.

about_intro_p2.default: Over the years, my work has moved across data engineering, ecommerce systems, web platforms, analytics infrastructure, internal tooling, and applied AI. The common thread isn't the stack, it's the systems thinking behind it.

about_intro_p3.default: I'm most comfortable in the in-between spaces: Where marketing meets data. Where operations meet software. Where automation meets real-world constraints.

about_why_lead.default: I've seen what happens when tools are added faster than they're understood.

about_why_1.default: Plugin stacks that conflict with each other.

about_why_3.default: AI features that sound impressive but don't integrate into daily work.

about_why_4.default: Ecommerce platforms held together by patches and hope.

about_why_after.default: None of that happens because teams are careless.

about_why_after2.default: It happens because growth outpaces structure.

about_why_accent.default: Manny Roy Consulting exists to slow that moment down —

about_why_f2.default: to design architecture before adding features,

about_why_f3.default: to make systems legible to the people who rely on them.

about_tech_1.default: Data architecture and analytics systems that inform actual decisions

about_tech_4.default: Custom internal tools that replace fragile manual workflows

about_tech_5.default: Web platform modernization and framework migrations

about_tech_6.default: Applied AI systems built into operations, not layered on top

about_tech_outro.default: The stack varies. The thinking doesn't.

about_ind_intro.default: My clients range from small community organizations to multi-location enterprise environments — often teams navigating growth, migration, or operational complexity.

about_ind_outro.default: Clarity across disciplines matters more than code alone.

about_beyond_p1.default: Home is a 150-year-old farmhouse in Souris, PEI, where the seasons are obvious and long-term thinking feels natural.

about_beyond_p2.default: Before tech, I worked in food trucks, kitchens, and taprooms. That environment taught me something useful: systems break under pressure if they aren't built thoughtfully.

about_beyond_p3.default: Good service is invisible when it works well. So are good systems.

about_cta_headline.default: If you're building something that needs to hold up over time, let's talk.

services_hero_subtext.default: Full-stack development, automation, and applied AI — grounded in data, collaboration, and measurable impact.

services_sys_intro.default: When systems grow faster than the structure supporting them, complexity compounds. I help teams clarify their architecture, untangle infrastructure decisions, and design systems that scale intentionally.

services_sys_ideal.default: Teams preparing to scale, migrate, or reduce technical debt.

services_soft_intro.default: I design and develop custom software and web applications that prioritize stability, clarity, and long-term maintainability over quick patches.

services_soft_ideal.default: Organizations outgrowing plugin stacks or needing custom operational tools.

services_auto_intro.default: Practical AI and automation that integrate into real workflows — not prototype theatre.

services_auto_ideal.default: Teams ready to implement AI responsibly and sustainably.

services_engage_p1.default: Manny Roy Consulting operates as an independent technical partner. Engagements are typically project-based, with options for ongoing advisory or implementation support.

services_engage_p2.default: I work collaboratively with internal teams, contractors, and stakeholders to ensure clarity, documentation, and smooth handoffs.

services_process_1_desc.default: Understand constraints, goals, and existing systems.

services_process_2_desc.default: Architect solutions grounded in sustainability and data.

services_cta_subtext.default: If you're navigating complexity or planning what's next, I'm happy to talk.

contact_hero_subtext.default: If you're navigating complexity, planning a system redesign, or exploring applied AI, I'm happy to start the conversation.

contact_intro_p1.default: Every engagement begins with a conversation. A short call helps clarify goals, constraints, and whether we're the right fit to work together.

contact_intro_p2.default: You don't need a fully defined brief — just a sense of what's not working or what needs to evolve.

contact_expect_p1.default: You can expect a response within 1–2 business days.

contact_expect_p2.default: If it feels like a strong fit, we'll schedule a short discovery call to clarify scope and next steps.

contact_reassure_heading.default: Not sure if it's the right time?

contact_reassure_p.default: If you're still exploring options or early in planning, that's fine. A brief conversation can help clarify direction — even if we don't work together.

thanks_body.default: I've received your inquiry and will get back to you within 1–2 business days.
